heroTitle: Enterprise AI Deployment, Workflow Intelligence, and Secure RAG
heroDesc: JOTO.AI provides a complete enterprise solution based on Dify technology, including private cloud deployment, intelligent workflows, and secure knowledge search.
overviewDesc: From private deployment to multi-tenant orchestration, we help enterprises build AI applications with high security and strong governance.
enterpriseDesc: Kubernetes-based private deployment with SSO, fine-grained permission control, and enterprise compliance.
scenariosDesc: 200+ workflow templates across finance, healthcare, automotive, and government for rapid business iteration.
ragDesc: Advanced multi-modal parsing solves 90% of RAG hallucinations and improves accuracy for documents, tables, and forms.
trainingDesc: Certified training and innovation workshops empower teams to build AI applications independently.
computeDesc: Hybrid cloud and on-premises compute solutions with model management, versioning, and evaluation tools.
securityDesc: Data protection, prompt injection prevention, and compliance support for secure large model deployment.
contactDesc: Leave your contact info and our team will respond within one business day.
